blended.narrative: Monarch Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,334 ft. Strong winds with gusts to 46 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 44°F, gusts to 46 mph.
Tomorrow: flurries, highs of 40°F, gusts to 52 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
